mainTabs.trialEnded: Your trial has ended. Subscribe to continue using EM Fit.

home.bannerSub: See your workouts and weekly stats in History.

alerts.updateMessage: Could not update this item. Please try again.

history.title: History
history.noWorkoutsDay: No workouts logged for this day.
history.logWorkoutsStats: Log workouts to see stats here.
history.progressHint: Totals are based on completed sets in each saved workout.

alerts.deleteMessage: This permanently deletes your account, workouts, nutrition logs, and other saved data. This cannot be undone.
alerts.deleteError: Could not delete account right now.
alerts.signOutError: Could not sign out. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.bodyMetricsHint: Used for protein/water targets and personalization.
settings.pushHint: Uses Expo push token + Firebase; reminders are sent when your device token is stored.
settings.reminderHint: Server sends at most one nudge per day in your chosen UTC hour (default 13:00 UTC).
settings.languageHint: More languages can be added later; strings are structured for i18n.

alerts.title: Settings
alerts.saveError: Could not save your settings. Please try again.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your streak.
login.onboardingLink: New here? Set weight, height & goal first

alerts.firebaseMessage: Add EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* keys to your .env file.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.subtitleWithProfile: Your profile from onboarding will be saved to your account.
signUp.subtitleNoProfile: Finish registration to start your free trial.

alerts.firebaseMessage: Add EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* keys to your .env file.

onboarding.title: Let's get to know you
onboarding.subtitle: This helps us personalize your experience.
onboarding.hint: You can change this anytime in Settings → Body metrics.

paywall.headline: Unlock Your Best Self
paywall.subtitle: Get unlimited access to everything you need to build healthy habits and see results.
paywall.expoBanner: You are in Expo Go. Real App Store purchases need a development or store build. Use the button below to unlock for testing.

features.workoutsDesc: Create custom routines and track without limits.
features.progressDesc: Detailed stats, charts, and performance insights.
features.libraryDesc: Access 90+ exercises with demo animations and instructions.
features.cloudDesc: Your data is always safe and accessible.

paywall.disclosure: Free for {{days}} days, then {{price}}. Subscription auto-renews until canceled in {{store}}.
paywall.paymentNote: Payment charged to your {{store}} account after the trial.
paywall.qaDevice: Unlock on this device only (no store)

alerts.linkErrorLater: Could not open this link. Please try again later.
alerts.linkErrorNow: Could not open this link right now.
alerts.sessionMessage: Please sign in again to continue.
alerts.devUnlockMessage: Premium access is enabled on this device for development. Sign out clears this override. Firestore subscription is unchanged.
alerts.qaUnlockFallback: You can still unlock on this device for UI testing.
alerts.qaUnlockError: Could not unlock subscription for QA.
alerts.restoreSuccess: Purchases restored. Your subscription status will update shortly.

missingFirebase.title: Firebase configuration required
missingFirebase.body: Create a Firebase project, enable Email/Password authentication and Cloud Firestore, then add EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* variables to a .env file in the mobile folder (see .env.example). Restart Expo after saving.

bodyMetrics.title: Body metrics
bodyMetrics.subtitle: Set your weight, height, and goal anytime. Habit targets use these values.

alerts.title: Body metrics
alerts.saveError: Could not save your body metrics. Please try again.

weightTracking.title: Body weight
weightTracking.formHint: Uses your device time. Profile weight updates to match your latest log.
weightTracking.emptyHistory: No entries yet — add your current weight above.

alerts.title: Weight
alerts.invalidWeight: Enter a valid weight in kg.
alerts.saveError: Could not save weight. Please try again.

exerciseLibrary.pickHintNone: Tap exercises to add them, then tap X to return.
exerciseLibrary.pickHintSome: {{count}} exercise selected. Tap X to return.
exerciseLibrary.pickHintSome_plural: {{count}} exercises selected. Tap X to return.

routines.title: Routines
routines.emptyPredefinedDesc: Try another filter or check Firestore seed/sync status.
routines.emptyMyDesc: Create your first routine and start tracking workouts.

alerts.exerciseRequired: Please add at least one exercise.
alerts.saveError: Could not save routine. Please try again.

routineDetail.title: Routine
routineDetail.defaultDescription: Focus on {{muscles}} with compound movements and isolation work.

alerts.exerciseUnavailable: Details for this exercise are not available yet.

workoutActive.restHint: Catch your breath. Next set ready when you are.
workoutActive.removeSetMessage: Remove this set from the workout?

alerts.loadError: Could not load this routine. Please go back and try again.
alerts.saveError: Could not save workout. Please try again.
alerts.endMessage: Save this session, discard it, or keep training.

weightProgressChart.title: Progress
weightProgressChart.empty: Log at least one weight to see your trend.

nutritionOverviewPanel.searchOrLog: Search food or log a meal
nutritionOverviewPanel.adjustMetrics: Adjust body metrics to recalculate targets

nutritionLogPanel.hint: Search the food database or use quick add. Totals update instantly on Overview.
nutritionLogPanel.emptyMeals: No meals yet — search a food or use quick add.

alerts.nutritionError: Could not update nutrition. Please try again.
alerts.macroRequired: Add at least one macro value (protein, carbs, or fat).
alerts.logError: Could not log meal. Please try again.

nutritionGoalVisualization.loseFatDetail: Moderate calorie deficit (~500 kcal below estimated maintenance).
nutritionGoalVisualization.buildMuscleDetail: Calorie surplus (~300 kcal) with higher protein for recovery.
nutritionGoalVisualization.maintainDetail: Targets match estimated maintenance for steady progress.

foodSearchModal.title: Food database
foodSearchModal.subtitle: Search foods or create a custom entry. Values are per 100g.

foodDatabasePanel.hint: Search the food database or create custom foods. Values are per 100g.
foodDatabasePanel.empty: No results. Try another term or category.
foodDatabasePanel.moreHintRefine: Refine your search to narrow results.
foodDatabasePanel.customHint: Macros per 100g. Saved to your history for reuse.

alerts.selectFood: Select a food and enter the amount in grams.
alerts.invalidGrams: Enter a valid amount in grams.
alerts.macroRequired: Add at least one macro or calories.

appError.requiresRecentLogin: For security, please sign in again and retry.
appError.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to do this action.
appError.unavailable: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
appError.networkError: Network error. Please check your internet connection and try again.
appError.purchaseExpoGo: Purchases require a development or store build. Expo Go does not support in-app purchases.
appError.purchaseTimeout: Purchase timed out. Please try again.
appError.purchaseSku: Subscription product is not configured correctly yet. Please contact support.
appError.purchaseGeneric: We could not complete your subscription. Please try again.

authError.signInInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
authError.signInWrongCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
authError.signInTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
authError.signInGeneric: Could not sign in right now. Please try again.
authError.signUpInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
authError.signUpEmailInUse: This email is already registered. Please sign in instead.
authError.signUpWeakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
authError.signUpGeneric: Could not create account right now. Please try again.
